'''Glova''' was a semi-tropical [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Glova system/Legends|Glova system]] colonized around [[195 BBY]]. When its precious metals ran dry, its [[Mining/Legends|mines]] were abandoned, and the inhabitants turned to [[Farm/Legends|farming]], becoming a leading supplier of food for planets in the region.

==History==
[[File:Mission_to_Glova.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[New Republic soldier/Legends|New Republic troopers]] attack the [[Governor's House]].]]
Around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the world was declared neutral and ruled by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tegist Byrg]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] maintained an [[New Republic Embassy (Glova)|embassy]] on this planet. [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Robet Makina]] organized a [[Mission to Glova|mission]] to capture the governor and reveal his connections with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="POC" />

In 4 ABY,<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the New Republic's [[New Republic First Fleet|First Fleet]], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Nantz]], [[Battle of Glova|drove]] the forces of [[Sander Delvardus]] from Glova, where New Republic [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tyr Taskeen]] led a ground attack with aid from [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] irregulars. The campaign at Glova limited Delvardus's influence by preventing his [[Eriadu Authority]] from joining with Imperial forces in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood]] and [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]].<ref name="EGW" />

==Inhabitants==
Glova was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Tenk Lenso]] and [[Jek Pugilio]].<ref name="EGW" />
